system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_tinhluyke","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE sp_TinhLuyKe
    @Nam INT,
    @Thang INT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @NgayThang DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam, @Thang, 1);
    DECLARE @NgayNam DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam, 1, 1);
    DECLARE @NgayTruoc DATE = DATEADD(MONTH, -1, @NgayThang);

    -- 1️⃣ Xóa dữ liệu cũ của tháng và năm được tính
    DELETE FROM tr_material_luyke 
    WHERE (loai = 'LuyKeThang' AND ngay = @NgayThang)
       OR (loai = 'LuyKeNam' AND ngay = @NgayNam);

    -------------------------------------
    -- 2️⃣ Lấy tồn đầu kỳ (và đơn giá tồn đầu)
    -------------------------------------
    ;WITH TonDau AS (
        SELECT 
            m.mavt,
            ISNULL(l.sltoncuoi, 0) AS sltondau,
            ISNULL(l.dgton, 0) AS dgtondau
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT mavt FROM tr_ctphieunhap
            UNION 
            SELECT DISTINCT mact AS mavt FROM tr_ctphieuxuat
        ) m
        LEFT JOIN tr_material_luyke l 
            ON l.mavt = m.mavt
           AND l.loai = 'LuyKeThang'
           AND l.ngay = @NgayTruoc
    ),
    -------------------------------------
    -- 3️⃣ Nhập & Xuất trong tháng (lọc giá > 0)
    -------------------------------------
    Nhap AS (
        SELECT 
            mavt,
            SUM(slnhap) AS slnhap,
            CASE 
                WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN gianhap > 0 THEN slnhap ELSE 0 END) > 0 
                THEN SUM(CASE WHEN gianhap > 0 THEN slnhap * gianhap ELSE 0 END)
                     / SUM(CASE WHEN gianhap > 0 THEN slnhap ELSE 0 END)
                ELSE 0 
            END AS dgnhapbq
        FROM tr_ctphieunhap
        WHERE YEAR(ngaynhap) = @Nam AND MONTH(ngaynhap) = @Thang
        GROUP BY mavt
    ),
    Xuat AS (
        SELECT 
            mact AS mavt,
            SUM(CASE WHEN giaxuat > 0 THEN soluong ELSE 0 END) AS slxuat
        FROM tr_ctphieuxuat
        WHERE YEAR(ngaytao) = @Nam AND MONTH(ngaytao) = @Thang
        GROUP BY mact
    )

    -------------------------------------
    -- 4️⃣ Ghi lũy kế tháng (NEWID cho Id)
    -------------------------------------
    INSERT INTO tr_material_luyke (Id, loai, mavt, ngay, sltondau, slnhap, slxuat, sltoncuoi, dgton)
    SELECT
        NEWID() AS Id,
        'LuyKeThang',
        t.mavt,
        @NgayThang AS ngay,
        t.sltondau,
        ISNULL(n.slnhap, 0),
        ISNULL(x.slxuat, 0),
        t.sltondau + ISNULL(n.slnhap, 0) - ISNULL(x.slxuat, 0),
        CASE 
            WHEN (t.sltondau + ISNULL(n.slnhap, 0)) > 0 
            THEN (
                (t.sltondau * t.dgtondau) +
                (ISNULL(n.slnhap, 0) * ISNULL(n.dgnhapbq, 0))
            ) / NULLIF(t.sltondau + ISNULL(n.slnhap, 0), 0)
            ELSE t.dgtondau
        END AS dgton
    FROM TonDau t
    LEFT JOIN Nhap n ON n.mavt = t.mavt
    LEFT JOIN Xuat x ON x.mavt = t.mavt;

    -------------------------------------
    -- 5️⃣ Lũy kế năm (cũng sinh Id bằng NEWID)
    -------------------------------------
    ;WITH LuyKeNam AS (
        SELECT 
            mavt,
            SUM(slNhap) AS slNhap,
            SUM(slXuat) AS slXuat
        FROM (
            SELECT mavt, SUM(slnhap) AS slNhap, 0 AS slXuat
            FROM tr_ctphieunhap
            WHERE YEAR(ngaynhap) = @Nam AND MONTH(ngaynhap) <= @Thang
            GROUP BY mavt
            UNION ALL
            SELECT mact AS mavt, 0, SUM(soluong)
            FROM tr_ctphieuxuat
            WHERE YEAR(ngaytao) = @Nam AND MONTH(ngaytao) <= @Thang
            GROUP BY mact
        ) a
        GROUP BY mavt
    )
    INSERT INTO tr_material_luyke (Id, loai, mavt, ngay, sltondau, slnhap, slxuat, sltoncuoi, dgton)
    SELECT 
        NEWID() AS Id,
        'LuyKeNam',
        n.mavt,
        @NgayNam,
        0,
        n.slnhap,
        n.slxuat,
        n.slnhap - n.slxuat,
        ISNULL(t.dgton, 0)
    FROM LuyKeNam n
    LEFT JOIN tr_material_luyke t 
        ON t.mavt = n.mavt 
       AND t.loai = 'LuyKeThang'
       AND t.ngay = @NgayThang;
END;
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.luykenam","dbo.nhap","dbo.tondau","dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material_luyke","dbo.xuat"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_material_luyke"],"flags":["has-cte","has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
